text:
is a 1 or 0 to accommodate a variety of types of drugs; 
position 1 is the leftmost digit. For example, if the value = 11000000 (1s in the 1st and 2nd digits), then 
generic and only selected brand drugs are covered on this tier during the coverage gap phase. 

1 in 1st digit = Only Select Brands 
1 in 2nd digit = All Generics 
1 in 3rd digit = All Preferred Generics 
1 in 4th digit = All Non-Preferred Generics 
1 in 5th digit = Only Select Generics 
1 in 6th digit = All Brands 
1 in 7th digit
